page_content:
THET799 Master's Thesis Research and Preparation (1-6 Credits) Research and preparation of the MA or MFA thesis. MA/MFA students must be registered for this class during the semester in which they defend their thesis. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

THET888 Doctoral Practicum in Theatre (1-6 Credits) Critical analysis of a phase of a professional ﬁeld of theatre. Analysis of professional activity through personal observation. Evaluation of the purpose, process, effectiveness, and efﬁciency of professional activity. Recommendations for training and further research. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

THET889 Doctoral Tutorial in Theatre and Performance Studies (1-6 Credits) Individually designed tutorials in which a PhD student works on a creative/scholarly project requiring signiﬁcant pedagogical interactions between the student and the instructor. This can include, but is not limited to, the development of an annotated bibliography in preparation for the comprehensive and qualifying examinations. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
